/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libmtmd.so -o ../../bin/libmtmd.so CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/mtmd.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/mtmd-audio.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/clip.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/mtmd.dir/mtmd-helper.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/randy/llama.cpp/bin: ../../bin/libllama.so ../../bin/libggml.so ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so ../../bin/libggml-cuda.so ../../bin/libggml-base.so /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so
